name: rondel
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework built on the Claude CLI

scripts.zod:check: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const out = execSync('pnpm ls zod --recursive --json', { encoding: 'utf8' }); const versions = new Set(); JSON.parse(out).forEach(pkg => { const z = (pkg.dependencies && pkg.dependencies.zod) || (pkg.devDependencies && pkg.devDependencies.zod); if (z) versions.add(z.version); }); if (versions.size > 1) { console.error('Multiple zod versions detected:', [...versions]); process.exit(1); } console.log('zod OK:', [...versions][0] || 'not installed');"
